subcodes.first_line: O pure God! Though I have become crazed and bereft of home and nest, yet am I a wanderer in Thy lane and distraught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک یزدانا اگرچه دیوانه و بی لانه و آشیانه گشتم ولی سرگشته کوی توام و آشفته
subcodes.subjects: @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @poems and quotation from poetry, @pain of love; love as veil
